user.title: Connect Classeviva
user.description: Enter your Classeviva credentials (same as the website or app). Parents use a code starting with **S** (e.g. `S1234567X`), students use their tax code.

data_description.username: Classeviva username (e.g. S1234567X or tax code)
data_description.student_name: Used to identify the sensor in Home Assistant (e.g. Marco)

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to Classeviva. Check your internet connection.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid credentials. Check your username and password at web.spaggiari.eu.

abort.already_configured: This Classeviva account is already configured in Home Assistant.
